## The Problem

What frustration or limitation prompted this idea?

## The Solution

What do you want to happen? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations — anything that helps paint the picture.
